lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello, what are you doing here?

lines.speaker: Cheryl
lines.text: Hi there, my husband and I are adventurers, Captain Janaway brought us here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What brings you to Great Kourend?

lines.speaker: Cheryl
lines.text: New lands to explore of course! Isn't it exciting? A whole new world that we know nothing about just waiting for us to discover it!
